title: 銅製品│Copper Products
description: 將遊戲中的許多物品改為用銅製作，使得銅變得非常有用。│Changed many items in the game to be crafted with copper, making copper quite useful.
body:
# 介紹│Introduce
將碗、弩、絆線鉤、盾牌、活塞、合成器、打火石、剪刀改為用銅做為原料。具體來說，該數據包改變了其紋理和配方。│Changed Bowl, Crossbow, Tripwire Hook, Shield, Piston, Crafter, Flint and Steel, and Shears to use copper as ingredients. Specifically, the data pack changes its texture and recipe.

如果你安裝的是數據包版本，你還需要安裝附加的資源包檔案。│If you install the data pack version, you also need to install the additional resource pack archive.

**※你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方│You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"**
# 與香草調整兼容│Compatible with Vanilla Tweaks
如果你安裝了[香草調整資源包](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)，並且有啟用選項"Groovy Levers"，那麼不論你安裝的是模組版本還是數據包版本，你都需要安裝名為"CP_is_compatible_with_VT"的附加資源包檔案，並將其的排序移動到所有資源包的最上方。│If you install the [Vanilla Tweaks Resource Pack](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) and have the option "Groovy Levers" enabled, then regardless of whether you install the mod version or the data pack version, you will also need to install an additional resource pack file called "CP_is_compatible_with_VT", and move it to the top of all resource packs.
# 更多│More
[點我](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT)查看更多我的作品。│[Click me](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT) to see more of my works.
